Claim: Vacuum is an active finite-density condensate
Evidence or calculation: Adopted physical postulate; no unique microscopic action yet
Required manuscript action: Retain explicitly as a postulate

Claim: Spatial topology is compact T3
Evidence or calculation: Adopted global boundary condition; observational scale not established
Required manuscript action: Retain as a declared postulate, not an inferred fact

Claim: a0 = c H0/(2 pi)
Evidence or calculation: Follows after adopting the scale-matching postulate; not independently derived from the condensate
Dependencies: Definition of H0 branch and scale matching
Required manuscript action: Retain with its postulate named every time

Claim: Low-acceleration square-root response
Evidence or calculation: A Y^(3/2) IR action yields the response in high symmetry
Dependencies: UV/IR matching; matter normalization; disk geometry
Required manuscript action: Retain as a conditional local EFT result

Claim: Present Born-Infeld action directly yields square-root force
Evidence or calculation: Its kinetic derivative tends to a nonzero constant at small X and gives a linear leading response
Required manuscript action: Remove as a derivation; at most reassign a separately justified UV role

Claim: C_proj = 2/3 is the observable local coupling
Evidence or calculation: The trace ratio is geometrically motivated but does not fix kinetic and vertex normalization
Required manuscript action: Describe as a tree-level matching hypothesis

Claim: BTFR coefficient is exactly 4/9
Evidence or calculation: Follows only if C_local = 2/3 and the asymptotic high-symmetry branch applies
Required manuscript action: Retain only as a conditional tree-level consequence

Claim: 4/9 is a strict lower bound that flows to unity
Evidence or calculation: Written beta function flows toward zero in the IR, not unity
Required manuscript action: Remove lower-bound and RG claims

Claim: Periodic local source uses density contrast
Evidence or calculation: Integral of a periodic divergence vanishes, requiring a zero-mean source
Required manuscript action: Retain in the canonical local/global split

Claim: Pointwise algebraic law is exact for finite disks
Evidence or calculation: Equal divergence does not imply equal vector fields; a solenoidal contribution is generally present
Required manuscript action: Label historical fits as an approximation

Claim: Matter-plenum exchange is Q_mp^nu
Evidence or calculation: Candidate action-level forms exist but microscopic interaction is not fixed
Required manuscript action: Introduce as a distinct current and derive it

Claim: Reservoir-plenum throughput is Q_syn^nu
Evidence or calculation: Required for a genuinely open observable subsystem; current functional form is phenomenological
Required manuscript action: Separate from Q_mp and avoid a fixed redshift law

Claim: Total stress-energy can have nonzero divergence
Evidence or calculation: Contracted Bianchi identity requires conservation of the complete declared system
Required manuscript action: Replace with sector exchange equations whose sum vanishes

Claim: Wake has causal memory and independent dynamics
Evidence or calculation: Conceptually recurrent but no validated hyperbolic or relaxation action exists
Required manuscript action: Retain as a research sector, not an explanation already achieved

Claim: High-acceleration branch automatically satisfies Solar-System bounds
Evidence or calculation: Relative suppression is not a PPN calculation and the matter force is not demonstrably screened
Required manuscript action: Withdraw compliance claim

Claim: Gravitational lensing follows from the local scalar force
Evidence or calculation: A purely conformal massive-matter coupling does not automatically change null trajectories
Required manuscript action: Withdraw until a lensing solution exists

Claim: Rectangular T3 produces anisotropic Casimir pressure
Evidence or calculation: Validated lattice energy and directional pressure calculation with convergence, trace and derivative checks
Dependencies: Periodic free scalar and rectangular moduli
Required manuscript action: Retain as a checked mechanism with stated field content

Claim: Free Casimir stress can transiently reach Ht/Hp = 13/12
Evidence or calculation: Bracketed numerical thresholds produce brief crossings for five tested initial shapes
Required manuscript action: Retain as a bounded negative/diagnostic result

Claim: Persistent Ht/Hp = 13/12 is a free-field attractor
Evidence or calculation: Stage 3B finds no plateau or attractor; valid trajectories return to unity
Dependencies: A separately derived driven stress sector
Required manuscript action: Withdraw as a prediction

Claim: 13/12 follows universally from cycle counting
Evidence or calculation: Directional pressure depends on the full lattice, moduli, field content and boundary conditions
Required manuscript action: Remove the cycle-counting derivation

Claim: H0 = 72.97 is a parameter-free prediction
Evidence or calculation: It is conditional arithmetic based on an unsupported persistent ratio and observational anchor assignment
Dependencies: Derived anisotropic cosmology and survey windows
Required manuscript action: Withdraw as a canonical prediction

Claim: Driven plenum may maintain anisotropic stress
Evidence or calculation: Free Casimir decay shows what extra source would be required; no constitutive conversion is derived
Required manuscript action: State as the CBR-002 hypothesis without targeting 13/12 by hand

Claim: SPARC p = 0.62 validates the model
Evidence or calculation: Cited program produced binned envelopes and did not compute a dataset-level p-value
Required manuscript action: Remove the number and associated fit-quality claims

Claim: SPARC independently measures cosmic H0
Evidence or calculation: Rotation curves constrain a0 conditional on a0=cH0/(2 pi); posteriors were broad or boundary-driven
Required manuscript action: Describe only as model-conditioned normalization

Claim: Current C=2/3 algebraic implementation is empirically established
Evidence or calculation: Controls near C=1 can fit better, but nuisance boundaries and disk approximation prevent a clean coefficient test
Required manuscript action: Report tension without declaring microscopic rejection

Claim: NANOGrav [1.08,pi] nHz is a derived topological prediction
Evidence or calculation: No condensate eigenmode calculation derives centroid, width or amplitude
Required manuscript action: Remove fixed interval as a prediction

Claim: Bottom-light IMF follows from plenum Jeans physics
Evidence or calculation: Displayed density dimensions and Jeans-length sign are incorrect
Required manuscript action: Remove the derivation; retain optimizer behavior only as a diagnostic

Claim: Bullet Cluster lensing offset is quantitatively reproduced
Evidence or calculation: Static galactic closure and toy fluid separation do not compute a relativistic lensing centroid
Dependencies: Wake dynamics, lensing and 3D collision simulation
Required manuscript action: Reclassify as an illustrative hypothesis

Claim: a0(z)=cH(z)/(2 pi) predicts high-z BTFR evolution
Evidence or calculation: Prior project test found insufficient magnitude and problematic trend
Required manuscript action: Keep in rejected register

Claim: One fiducial ITSM cosmological background exists
Evidence or calculation: Different n and w branches were combined across diagnostics
Required manuscript action: Declare one background before CMB, growth or age tests

Claim: Current perturbation equations establish CMB and S8 predictions
Evidence or calculation: Calculations use effective mappings and sometimes inconsistent backgrounds
Dependencies: Action-derived perturbations and one fiducial background
Required manuscript action: Present only as diagnostics

Claim: ITSM is globally parameter-free
Evidence or calculation: The framework contains postulates, fitted cosmological quantities, nuisance parameters and unmatched Wilson coefficients
Dependencies: Closed gates and explicit parameter inventory
Required manuscript action: Replace with narrowly scoped statements about absent halo parameters
